assertsPredicateParameterMismatch.tlua(7,12): error TS1225: Cannot find parameter 'condition'.
assertsPredicateParameterMismatch.tlua(9,15): error TS2304: Cannot find name 'Error'.
assertsPredicateParameterMismatch.tlua(15,3): error TS2584: Cannot find name 'console'. Do you need to change your target library? Try changing the 'lib' compiler option to include 'dom'.


==== assertsPredicateParameterMismatch.tlua (3 errors) ====
    // This test verifies that the checker doesn't panic when an assertion predicate
    // references a parameter name that doesn't match any actual function parameter.
    // This specifically tests the code path in isReachableFlowNodeWorker.
    
    function assertCondition(
      _condition: boolean
    ): asserts condition {  // "condition" doesn't match parameter "_condition"
               ~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TS1225: Cannot find parameter 'condition'.
      if (!_condition) {
        throw new Error('Condition failed');
                  ~~~~~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'Error'.
      }
    }
    
    function test(): void {
      assertCondition(false);
      console.log("unreachable");
      ~~~~~~~
!!! error TS2584: Cannot find name 'console'. Do you need to change your target library? Try changing the 'lib' compiler option to include 'dom'.
    }
